title: ProtoCharset
body:
So someone decided to figuratively resurrect ModLoader, with the addition of mixins. As a person who enjoys reinventing modding from secondary principles, I just had to try it out!

This is a prototype version of certain Charset features for Minecraft 1.13 + Rift.

Features implemented:

    (0.0.2+) crafting.pocket (Pocket Crafting Table item)
    (0.0.1+) tweaks.doubleDoor (double door opening tweak)
    (0.0.4+) tweaks.inventoryEffectRenderer (improved rendering of potion effects; inspired by NoPotionShift)
    (0.0.2+) tweaks.mapCompass (holding map and compass at the same time makes compass point at map center; video)
    (0.0.1+) tweaks.rightClickHarvest (sneak-right-click to harvest)

Requires Rift!

Project icon utilizes Unity textures by CyanideX.

Please note that, as of 0.1.0 or so, ProtoCharset will become a library mod only. Tweak functionality will be moved to another mod or a few.
